Ensure AWS Load Balancers use strong ciphers

for_each: ${{for k , v in {'ex-https': {'certificate_arn': '${module.acm.acm_certificate_arn}', 'forward': {'target_group_key': 'ex-instance'}, 'mutual_authentication': {'mode': 'verify', 'trust_store_arn': 'try(aws_lb_trust_store.this[0].arn,None)'}, 'port': 443, 'protocol': 'HTTPS', 'rules': {'ex-fixed-response': {'actions': {'fixed_response': {'content_type': 'text/plain', 'message_body': 'This is a fixed response', 'status_code': 200}}, 'conditions': {'http_header': {'http_header_name': 'x-Gimme-Fixed-Response', 'values': ['please', 'right now', 'yes']}}, 'priority': 3}}, 'ssl_policy': 'ELBSecurityPolicy-TLS13-1-2-Res-2021-06'}} : k :> v if local.create}}
